prompt_text:
### Demographics: 59-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 73.8 kg; Height 168.5 cm; BMI 26.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 114/63 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.3%; 9 months ago 8.0%; 6 months ago 7.5%; 3 months ago 7.0%; current 5.9%), FPG (12 months ago 228mg/dL; 9 months ago 190mg/dL; 6 months ago 164mg/dL; 3 months ago 150mg/dL; current 143mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 73.1kg; 9 months ago 72.7kg; 6 months ago 75.3kg; 3 months ago 73.7kg; current 73.8kg), Height (12 months ago 168.5cm; 9 months ago 168.5cm; 6 months ago 168.5cm; 3 months ago 168.5cm; current 168.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 26.0kg/m²; current 26.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 114mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 65mmHg; 9 months ago 66mmHg; 6 months ago 64mmHg; 3 months ago 63mmHg; current 63mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 44U/L; 9 months ago 50U/L; 6 months ago 49U/L; 3 months ago 49U/L; current 49U/L), AST (12 months ago 45U/L; 9 months ago 40U/L; 6 months ago 47U/L; 3 months ago 39U/L; current 45U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 47mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 48mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; current 48mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 93mg/g; 9 months ago 94mg/g; 6 months ago 121mg/g; 3 months ago 81mg/g; current 86mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 93mg/dL; 9 months ago 93mg/dL; 6 months ago 97mg/dL; 3 months ago 100mg/dL; current 96mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 55mg/dL; 3 months ago 58mg/dL; current 56mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 123mg/dL; 9 months ago 124mg/dL; 6 months ago 123mg/dL; 3 months ago 121mg/dL; current 116mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
